description: Address review feedback: fix redundant ordering coverage, incomplete pipeline diagram, anti-pattern #1 fix, dedup placement, and having-equivalent pattern
steps: Consolidate redundant ordering coverage between 'Command Pipeline Ordering Rules' and 'Command Ordering & Gotchas' sections
Expand the pipeline diagram to include missing commands (dedup, pattern, diff, join, relevantfields, addtotals, expand/unnest)
Fix anti-pattern #1's correct approach to properly address filtering after stats
Clarify dedup placement in the pipeline diagram
Add a having-equivalent pattern section documenting the canonical workaround for post-aggregation filtering
acceptance_criteria: No redundant ordering rules between the two sections - each rule appears in exactly one authoritative location
Pipeline diagram accounts for all commands documented in the file or has explicit scoping notes
Anti-pattern #1 shows a correct and useful workaround for the 'filter after stats' problem
dedup placement is clear in the pipeline diagram
A having-equivalent pattern is explicitly documented with a working example
verification: Read cloudwatch-logs-query-builder.skill.md and confirm all 5 review issues are addressed
findings: All 5 review issues addressed: (1) Removed redundant 'Command Ordering & Gotchas' section and merged all rules into the Ordering Constraints table; (2) Expanded pipeline diagram to show dedup, pattern, diff, join, relevantfields, addtotals with proper placement; (3) Fixed anti-pattern #1 with honest explanation of no HAVING equivalent and sort desc + limit as workaround; (4) Added dedup to pipeline diagram with explicit 'sort MUST precede dedup' notation; (5) Added full 'Post-Aggregation Filtering' subsection with 3 workarounds.
